author: Chidera Ibe
name: L-BFGS SLOT-8
blurb: Replaces SLOT's AdamW optimizer with L-BFGS — a second-order quasi-Newton method provably optimal for small optimization problems (1536 params). 8 outer steps with strong Wolfe line search and history_size=10. Novel: no other submission uses second-order optimization for SLOT. Built on PR #1313 base.
